PORT.description: Port Vaultwarden listens on (Railway-injected, keep at 8080)

ROCKET_ADDRESS.description: Bind address for the web server (0.0.0.0 = all interfaces)

DATA_FOLDER.description: Folder for the database and data files. Must match the volume mount path (/data) so data persists.

DATABASE_URL.description: Database connection string. Leave empty to use the bundled SQLite database.

HIBP_API_KEY.description: Have I Been Pwned API key for breach checking. Optional — leave empty to skip checks.

ADMIN_TOKEN.description: Token to access the admin panel at /admin. Auto-generated on deploy.

DISABLE_ADMIN_TOKEN.description: Set to true to disable the admin panel. Default false = admin panel enabled.

SIGNUPS_VERIFY.description: Require email verification on signup. Default false for one-click deployment.

IP_HEADER.description: HTTP header used to determine the client IP (e.g. X-Real-IP). Leave empty to use the connection IP.
